title: Important Compliance Alert: Income Tax Due Dates for May 6, 2026!
content:
# Important Compliance Alert: Income Tax Due Dates for May 6, 2026!

Ek important update hai. Income Tax Department ne April 2026 ke compliance due dates reiterate kiye hain jo May 6, 2026 ko fall kar rahe hain.

*   **TDS/TCS Deposit (April 2026):** April 2026 ke liye deduct ya collect kiya gaya tax deposit karne ki last date May 6, 2026 hai.
*   **Government Offices ke liye:** Agar challan ke bina payment ho rahi hai, toh government offices ko deducted/collected amount Central Government ke credit mein same day pay karna hoga.
*   **Section 394(2) Declaration (April 2026):** Buyers dwara Income-tax Act 2025 ke Section 394(2) ke under declaration, goods without tax collection (April 2026) obtain karne ke liye, ki due date bhi May 6, 2026 hai.

## Read the Official Document
* [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://www.incometax.gov.in/iec/foportal/tax-calendar)

*Published on: 5 May 2026*
